generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are leaving us vulnerable? While we're carrying the burden of collective defense, some partners are cutting their contributions. This isn't just about money—it's about lives. When our allies shirk their responsibilities, our families pay the price. We need to demand accountability and ensure our alliances are strong enough to face real threats. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
